Key findings: low-modulus polyolefin (7 MPa) outperforms EVA and stiff Surlyn; EVA produces acetic acid degrading perovskite; stiff encapsulants cause delamination. Relevant as general encapsulant adhesion under damp heat but specific to perovskite PV, not DVS-PEI flexible electronics."}]}
